name: inat-species-gallery
description: search_observations returns observations with photos. Each observation has {id, species_guess, taxon: {name, preferred_common_name}, photos: [{url}], observed_on, place_guess, quality_grade}. Photo URLs use iNaturalist CDN; replace 'square' with 'medium' or 'large' for higher res.
data_shape: array of {id: number, species_guess: string, taxon: {name: string, preferred_common_name: string}, photos: [{url: string}], observed_on: string, place_guess: string, quality_grade: string}

name: inat-observations-map
description: search_observations with lat/lng returns geolocated wildlife sightings. Each has {id, location: [lat, lng], taxon: {name}, observed_on, place_guess}. Plot on a map to show species distribution.
data_shape: array of {id: number, location: string (lat,lng), taxon: {name: string, preferred_common_name: string}, observed_on: string, place_guess: string}
